summary: Admin Transfers Queue Sender Info Enhancement - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API returns sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban for all transfers. Frontend displays new Sender column in table and Sender (From) section in details panel.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing production transfers for READ-ONLY testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Transfers Queue enhancement tested and verified. Backend now joins transfers with users and bank_accounts collections to get sender info. Frontend displays Sender column in table and Sender (From) section in details panel with name, email, and IBAN.

features_tested: API /api/v1/admin/transfers returns sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban fields - PASSED
SUBMITTED tab shows Date, Sender, Beneficiary, Amount, Status, Action columns - PASSED
COMPLETED tab shows Date, Sender, Beneficiary, Amount, Status, Action columns - PASSED
REJECTED tab shows Date, Sender, Beneficiary, Amount, Status, Reason, Action columns - PASSED
Sender column displays sender name and email in table rows - PASSED
Transfer Details panel shows Sender (From) section with name, email, IBAN - PASSED
Transfer Details panel shows Beneficiary (To) section with name, IBAN - PASSED
Approve Transfer button visible in SUBMITTED details - PASSED
Reject Transfer button visible in SUBMITTED details - PASSED
All three tabs (SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED) switch correctly - PASSED

api_verification.completed_transfers: Returns sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban (some show 'Unknown User' if user deleted)
api_verification.rejected_transfers: Returns sender_name, sender_email, sender_iban, plus reject_reason field

frontend_verification.table_columns: Date, Sender, Beneficiary, Amount, Status, [Reason for REJECTED], Action
frontend_verification.details_panel_sender_section: SENDER (FROM) label + Name + Email + IBAN (monospace font)

testing_approach: READ-ONLY testing as per instructions - did not approve/reject any real transfers
